context: Post-FF-002 fixture correction rebaseline with FF-003 analysis

family_details.name: Table-format arithmetic corruption (synthetic data)
family_details.reason: Synthetic invoices have arithmetically inconsistent line items. Requires synthetic data generator fix, not extraction-level intervention.

family_details.name: No-PO email-style OCR — eval fixture integrity
family_details.reason: Fixture patched 2026-03-15. All 5 cases now reach EXCEPTION_NO_PO.

family_details.name: Extended-field extraction failure (invoice_date + tax_amount)
family_details.reason: FF-003 analysis confirmed 3 distinct sub-modes. Two are verifier-level issues potentially addressable by prompt or regex changes. One (INV-1074) is an arithmetic failure that may overlap with FF-001/L1.

family_details.name: Sparse-tag extraction failure (match_fail only)
family_details.reason: N=2, no diagnostic tags. Root cause unknown. Needs manual inspection of GLC-4005 and APX-5004.

leading_target.rationale: Largest remaining production-relevant blocked family (6/20 = 30% of blocked). FF-003 analysis confirmed two verifier-level sub-modes (DATE_AMBIGUOUS, TAX_AMOUNT_MISMATCH) that are potentially addressable. FF-001 is larger (12) but requires synthetic data fix (not extraction-level). FF-004 is too small (2) and lacks diagnostic signal.
